feature.heading: Core Concept
feature.body: Focusing on sustainability and modern aesthetics.

story.heading: Harmonious Integration
story.col1: The design seamlessly blends the built environment with surrounding natural elements, creating a cohesive visual language.
story.col2: Light and shadow play a crucial role in defining the spatial experience throughout the day.

closing.ctaBody: Ready to move this concept into development.
